sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root יָשַׁר)-

(1) uprightness, justice, Psa 45:7 adv. justly, Psa 67:5.

(2) a plain, a level country, Isa 40:4 42:16 Psa 143:10 with art. הַמִּישֹׁור κατʼ ἐξοχὴν a plain in the tribe of Reuben, near the city of מֵידְבָא Deu 3:10 4:43 Jos 13:9, 16 Jos 13:16, 17 Jos 13:17, 21 Jos 13:21 20:8 Jerem. 48:21 .
